title: CPU load goes up to 100% when Virtuoso runs its look up processing
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE Spot (id INT PRIMARY KEY, label VARCHAR(255), categoryURI VARCHAR(255), locality VARCHAR(255), created TIMESTAMP, modified TIMESTAMP, outdoor BOOLEAN, charge DECIMAL(10, 2), reservation BOOLEAN, ageFrom INT, ageTo INT, url VARCHAR(255), listImage VARCHAR(255), detailImage VARCHAR(255), openDate1 DATE, openTime1 TIME, openDate2 DATE, openTime2 TIME, promoter VARCHAR(255), facilityURI VARCHAR(255), description TEXT);

INSERT INTO Spot (id, label, categoryURI, locality, created, modified, outdoor, charge, reservation, ageFrom, ageTo) VALUES (1, 'Sample Spot', 'http://www.example.com/LOD/sp/category/1', 'Sample Locality', NOW(), NOW(), TRUE, 10.50, FALSE, 5, 15);

INSERT INTO Spot (id, label, categoryURI, locality, created, modified, outdoor, charge, reservation, ageFrom, ageTo) VALUES (2, NULL, 'http://www.example.com/LOD/sp/category/2', 'Sample Locality', NOW(), NOW(), FALSE, NULL, TRUE, 0, 10);
SELECT COUNT(*) AS NumberOfQuads FROM Spot WHERE ageFrom IS NOT NULL AND ageTo IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM Spot WHERE locality = 'Sample Locality' AND (charge IS NULL OR charge < 20.00);
key_bug_features: CPU load spikes during SPARQL look up processing
